# Fixture: no_is_not_optout
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 56.5s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Louis! Welcome to Shiftsmart.
Partner: Help
Concierge: No problem! To start your orientation, open the Shiftsmart app and tap the In-app orientation card.
Partner: How do I change to bus rider
Concierge: Keep checking the Shifts tab — new shifts closer to you are added regularly.
Partner: No

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
The app doesn't have a transportation setting. Looking a few days ahead in the Shifts tab often shows more options.
